response.original_title: St. Paul Past - River, Railroads & Rondo
response.overview: The days of lumber barons, steamboats, railroads and waves of early ethnic immigrants come to life once more in this show celebrating Minnesota's capitol city.  Program explores the history of St. Paul, Minnesota through stories of four key places in St. Paul: Lower Landing, Merriam Park, Summit Avenue and Rondo. Later released under title: St. Paul past.
response.title: St. Paul Past - River, Railroads & Rondo
